ANTI RAGGING COMMITTEE
Sri Eshwar has a zero tolerance policy to ragging.  As per the guidelines from AICTE, UGC and Anna University and Directorate of Technical Education- TamilNadu, Anti-Ragging Committee is constituted at Sri Eshwar College with members from academics, government departments, NGO/society, parents and students. The Committee discharges its duty to preserve a Culture of Ragging Free Environment in the College Campus.
OBJECTIVES
Anti Ragging committee serves to ensure the campus has no incidents however minor related to ragging or bullying of any student.
We promote an environment where students feel free to express themselves and share any incidents big or small which can be acted up immediately.
Ensure that any grievance related to ragging or bullying, however small, can be investigated thoroughly and disciplinary action taken should the issue be justified.
NODAL OFFICER
Dr.N.Shanmugasundaram
Professor and Head, ECE Department
